name: io.github.var-gg/pindoc
description: Code-pinned team memory for AI coding agents — typed artifacts, MCP-native, self-host.

environmentVariables.name: PINDOC_DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Postgres connection string. Use the bundled docker compose stack for the recommended pgvector setup.

environmentVariables.name: PINDOC_BIND_ADDR
environmentVariables.description: Daemon bind address. Loopback (127.0.0.1:5830) by default; set a non-loopback value only behind an IdP or trusted proxy.
